payload.answer: I have an existing memory that Sara is your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. I should not overwrite or add this as current without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The name Sara matches the existing entity, but the stated relationship conflicts with the existing relationship and may refer to the same person or a different Sara.

details: Detected a conflict between existing and new relationship claims.

repair_options: Confirm this is the same Sara and her relationship should be updated from daughter to niece.
Confirm this is a different Sara who is your niece.
Confirm both relationships are true and explain the family context.
